activities_projects.title: Courts Around Us
activities_projects.objective: Identify different types of courts in India
steps: Write the names of three types of courts (Supreme Court, High Court, District Court)
Write where each court is located
Share your answers in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the structure of courts in India

activities_projects.title: Role of Judges
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of judges in the judiciary
steps: Write who a judge is
List two duties of a judge
Explain why judges should be fair

activities_projects.title: Meaning of Judiciary
steps: Write the meaning of the judiciary
Write why it is important in a democracy
Give one example of its work
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the basic concept of judiciary

activities_projects.title: Court Vocabulary
activities_projects.objective: Learn common words related to courts
steps: Write words like judge, law, justice, court
Write simple meanings for each
Use one word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Importance of Laws
steps: Write two reasons why laws are important
Give an example of a law
Explain how it helps people

activities_projects.title: Simple Court Case Story
steps: Write a short story about a disagreement between two people
Explain how the court solved the problem
Write the final decision

activities_projects.title: Hierarchy of Courts Chart
steps: Draw three levels of courts
Write the names of the courts
Decorate and present the chart

activities_projects.title: Fair and Unfair Situations
steps: Write one fair situation and one unfair situation
Explain why the unfair situation needs justice
Explain how courts help solve it

activities_projects.title: Rights and Courts
steps: Write two rights people have
Explain how courts protect these rights
Give an example

activities_projects.title: Class Discussion on Justice
activities_projects.objective: Encourage understanding of justice in society
steps: Discuss with classmates what justice means
Write two points from the discussion
Write a short summary
